summary: Approved after Hermes review adjusted OpenCode output to place the signature in the tab shell instead of wrapping the root Stack. The final implementation is a small reusable Pressable attribution badge rendered above the tab bar, preserving navigation layout and dark/slate/blue styling.

checks.name: scope
checks.notes: Visible Created By Deerflow text links to https://deerflow.tech and opens externally/new tab on web.

checks.name: design
checks.notes: Uses existing color tokens, low opacity, compact pill styling, and avoids visual competition with content.

checks.name: security
checks.notes: No secrets or remote changes; external URL is fixed Deerflow attribution.

checks.name: validation
checks.notes: Hermes terminal validation passed: cd web-client && npx tsc --noEmit; cd web-client && npm run build.

checks.name: go-tests
checks.notes: go is not installed on PATH in this Hermes environment.
